tabs.content:
capacity_events
| mv-expand breakdown = data_capacityUnitUtilizationBreakdown
| mv-expand breakdown2 = breakdown
| where tostring(breakdown.WorkloadKind) == "AI"
| extend AI_CU_Consumption = toreal(breakdown.Utilization.Interactive) + toreal(breakdown.Utilization.Background)
| summarize totalAI_CU_Consumption=sum(AI_CU_Consumption) by data_windowStartTime, data_windowEndTime
| where totalAI_CU_Consumption > 0
tabs.title: Explore: capacity_events
